overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a stormy, fog-covered grassland at night. Heavy rain and turbulent clouds create an ominous atmosphere with extremely low visibility in what appears to be atmospheric game engine footage, likely from a survival or horror title.

scene_state.functional_zone: storm-swept open moorland with scattered vegetation

events.description: distant lightning flash briefly illuminates the storm clouds and terrain ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the uneven grassy terrain, navigating through heavy fog and rain with limited visibility

entered.detail: dark turbulent storm clouds covering the entire sky with occasional lightning
uneven ground covered with tall brown grass and patches of exposed dirt
solitary dark silhouette of a tree barely visible through the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a desolate storm-swept grassland at night. Heavy rain and dense fog reduce visibility to near zero, with only occasional lightning flashes illuminating the turbulent clouds overhead. The terrain consists of uneven grassy ground with scattered patches of vegetation, while distant trees appear as dark silhouettes against the stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate, storm-swept grassland shrouded in oppressive darkness. It begins with the camera pushing through dense fog and heavy rain that reduce visibility to near zero, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere. As the camera advances across the uneven, grassy terrain, occasional flashes of lightning momentarily pierce the gloom to illuminate the turbulent clouds overhead. The scene then reveals scattered patches of vegetation and dark, silhouetted trees that emerge from the mist before fading back into the stormy night.
